item.description: Russia warns war costs are ravaging its finances as Ukrainian 'drone overmatch' halts Putin's forces  FortuneRussia overspends on Putin’s war in Ukraine by $28bn  Financial TimesRussia faces US$28 billion shortfall in this year's war budget, report says  Українська правдаNEWS10 in Your Town: Greene County Department of Economic Development, Tourism, and Planning  YahooRussia’s Finance Ministry asked government to freeze spending across all budget lines except military, FT reports  Meduza

item.title: Putin says remark on Ukraine war coming to an end was based...
item.description: Putin says remark on Ukraine war coming to an end was based on battlefield advances  ReutersUkraine war live: Putin denies blame for Romania drone hit and says conflict near end  The IndependentPutin Claims Russia’s Full-Scale Invasion Nears End Without Providing Timeline  UNITED24 MediaThe situation in the SMO area is nearing completion — Putin  EADailyPutin reiterates claim that war is nearing its end but refuses to give timeline  Українська правда
